summary: Creator Digest Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All key features verified - Daily Challenge banner with 'Friendship Story' and Join Challenge CTA, Notification Bell with dropdown showing notifications, Dashboard metrics visible. Creator Digest endpoints (preview/send/run) working correctly with admin-only access and weekly cap enforcement.

issues: Cookie consent banner overlaps with content - minor visual issue (same as previous iterations)

details: GET /api/retention/digest/preview/{user_id} returns digest with views, remixes, top_story, momentum, percentile, rising_fast, cta
Admin-only access enforced (403 for non-admin)
Returns null with reason for users with no activity
Digest structure includes all expected fields
POST /api/retention/digest/send/{user_id} sends digest email
Admin-only access enforced (403 for non-admin)
Weekly cap prevents duplicate digest in same week (sent=False when cap hit)
Email events logged with template='creator_digest'
POST /api/retention/digest/run triggers weekly run for all active creators
Admin-only access enforced (403 for non-admin)
Returns summary with sent/skipped/total_creators counts
GET /api/retention/email-events shows digest events alongside regular events
Admin-only access enforced (403 for non-admin)
Events include user_id, template, status fields
Daily Challenge banner visible on Dashboard
Shows 'TODAY'S CHALLENGE' label with 'Friendship Story' title
Join Challenge CTA button visible and functional
Notification bell visible in header (top right)
Click opens dropdown with notifications list
Shows notifications like 'Comic Strip Ready!', 'Comic Strip Failed'
Failed job endpoint accessible
No raw enums visible in UI
Edit option visible in studio

critical_code_review_comments: Creator Digest implementation correctly computes weekly stats (views, remixes, momentum, percentile)
Weekly cap (max 1/week) properly enforced via email_events collection lookup
Smart skip for zero-activity users working correctly
User lookup fixed to search by 'id' field first (matching users collection schema)
Email delivery via Resend will fail for non-owner emails due to domain verification - this is expected behavior, not a bug
Digest HTML template renders clean, mobile-friendly email with stats, top story, and personalized CTA
seed_data_creation: Used existing user ea3b038c-d523-4a49-9fa5-e00c761fa4aa for digest testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Creator Digest feature is complete and working. Key features: (1) Digest preview/send/run endpoints with admin-only access, (2) Weekly cap prevents duplicate digests (max 1/week), (3) Smart skip for zero-activity users, (4) Email events logged with template='creator_digest'. Note: Resend email delivery will show 'failed' status due to domain verification - this is expected behavior. Previous retention features (daily challenge, notification bell, remix stats) continue to work correctly.

mocked_apis.notes: Email delivery via Resend is REAL but will fail for non-owner emails due to domain verification requirement on Resend free tier. This is expected behavior - the email infrastructure is correct, events are logged to email_events collection.

playwright_results.notification_dropdown_opens: PASS (shows Comic Strip Ready!, Comic Strip Failed)
